title: The Pussycat Dolls Get Back Together for Music and Shows
summary: The Pussycat Dolls, a famous girl group, are reuniting after many years. Nicole Scherzinger, Ashley Roberts, and Kimberly Wyatt are the three members who will perform together again. They have made a new song called Club Song and will go on a big world tour starting in June. The tour will visit many places like North America, Europe, and the UK, including cities like London and Dublin. The group first became popular in 2005 with hits like Buttons. They are happy to be back and celebrate as women. Some other original members are not joining this time, but the group says their lineup can change. They are excited to sing and dance on stage again.

background_read: The Pussycat Dolls are a girl group that started in 2005 and became very popular with songs like Buttons. They had six members originally, but over time, some left or joined. The group is known for dancing and singing. They stopped performing together for a while, but now three of them are getting back to make new music and go on tour. This is exciting for fans who loved their old songs.
Article_Structure: WHO: Nicole Scherzinger, Ashley Roberts, and Kimberly Wyatt from The Pussycat Dolls
WHAT: They are reuniting to release a new song called Club Song and go on a world tour
WHERE: The tour will visit North America, Europe, and the UK, including cities like London and Dublin
WHY: They want to celebrate where they are as women and perform together again after 20 years

perspectives.description: The members are happy to reunite and show their growth as women over the years.
